title: The Racetrack Murders
writer: Franz Josef Gottlieb, Bryan Edgar Wallace
actors: Hansjörg Felmy, Ann Smyrner, Hans Nielsen
plot: (1964) Hansjorg Felmy, Ann Smyrner, Hans Nielson, Walter Rilla. Mystery at the track! A well-known thoroughbred is slain by a rival horse owner. Soon jockeys are being murdered by a mysterious killer. Scandals, blackmail, and drug...
